_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Golang Custom (Universal Pro)
author: dapaupau@sigaul.com
description: Pro-tier Golang egg by YuraCloud. Optimized for performance, auto-updates, security scanning, and full customization.
startup: if [ -d .git ] && [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then git pull; fi; if [ -f go.mod ]; then go mod tidy; fi; exec ${CMD_RUN}

installation.script:
#!/bin/sh
apk add --no-cache curl git go
cd /mnt/server

if [ -f go.mod ]; then
    go mod tidy
fi

if [ ! -f main.go ]; then
cat << 'EOF' > main.go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func main() {
	port := os.Getenv("PORT")
	if port == "" {
		port = os.Getenv("SERVER_PORT")
	}
	if port == "" {
		port = "8080"
	}

	fmt.Printf("Server started on :%s\n", port)

	http.HandleFunc("/", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		fmt.Fprintf(w, "Hello from Pterodactyl Golang!\n")
	})

	http.ListenAndServe(":"+port, nil)
}
EOF
fi

# --- Auto-detect Region ---
DETECTED_REGION=$(curl -s http://ip-api.com/line?fields=country | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$DETECTED_REGION" ]; then DETECTED_REGION="Unknown"; fi

# --- Branding and Information ---
echo ""
echo "=================================================="
echo "                  YuraCloud                       "
echo "=================================================="
echo "Informasi Server:"
echo "UUID      : ${P_SERVER_UUID}"
echo "Region    : ${DETECTED_REGION}"
echo "Port      : ${SERVER_PORT}"
echo "Egg Type  : Golang"
echo "=================================================="
echo "    Terima kasih sudah membeli di YuraCloud!      "
echo "=================================================="
echo ""
